meanings.definition: an udder or breast or teat
turn up, loosen, or remove earth
examples: turn over the soil for aeration
She was digging away at her math homework

meanings.definition: remove, harvest, or recover by digging

examples: dig the oars into the water
dig your foot into the floor

meanings.definition: remove the inner part or the core of
examples: the mining company wants to excavate the hillside
he jabbed his finger into her ribs
Do you comprehend the meaning of this letter?
